narrative:
Precinct Sherman Twp (precinct in Huron County) has 341 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.6 percentage points.
